heroSubtitle: Ikhadi lakho lebhasi, manje lisephaketheni lakho. Akukho amabhande. Akukho mali eqolo. Ukukhokha nje kwe-virtual.
infoCardText: Ukulawula ikhadi lakho le-A Re Yeng noma iTshwane akuzange kube lula kanjena. Faka imali, ulandelele uhambo lwakho, futhi ufinyelele ikhadi lakho le-virtual konke ku-inthanethi, ngaphandle kokuvakashela isiteshi.
